mapper.select: SELECT mpp.id, mpp.platform_type, mpp.product_id, mpp.person_id, mpp.file_url, mpp.file_type, mpp.state, mpp.take_date, mpp.remark, mpp.is_deleted, mpp.create_time, mpp.update_time FROM product_media mpp INNER JOIN brush_order_resource mor ON mor.file_id = mpp.id WHERE mor.order_id = #{orderId}
